title: §0Stronger (Daft Speed)
lines: If-a If If If you try to duel me

[Work it harder, make it better]

[More than ever, hour after]
[Our work is never]
Get your game on
Yo, listen up, home boy. Let me be the tutor
I'm 'bout to tell you all about how we saved the future
It stated out with Jaden Yuki hanging out in Venice
Last thing I knew, Crowler had me playing tennis
Then this guy rolls up, on his motorcycle
He got a freaky-ass mask like that Myers named Michael
He's trying to kill me man, for all he's worth
Shouting out this weird crap about saving the Earth
And then he revs up his bike, he's got that need for speed
It's a good thing I played all the Assassin's Creed
But then the sky turned black, out comes this huge dragon

It's in hot pursuit, shooting fireballs
Got me jumping the roofs and got me climbing the walls

I whip out my duel disk and I push it to the limit saying
